PR #117 metadata preflight passed for head `61c7ca18bf5ddded629d75e3388c6368f19729a9`; packaged `flow pre-review` attempt `GH-100-pre-review-61c7ca18bf5d-01596b4f004b` passed after explicit N/A evidence confirmed this consumer repo has no `tools/` directory. `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are not applicable in this repo. A first packaged `flow spec-review` attempt `GH-100-spec-review-61c7ca18bf5d-9de8426e4659` fell back because the newly authored spec review artifact was uncommitted and the scope summary did not explicitly include GH-100 review artifacts; this carrier sync classifies and fixes that metadata issue before rerunning review. `loom doctor` reported CLI freshness stale against npm but installed surface diagnostics passed and plugin payload was current. The direct `loom build` wrapper was classified as an adapter/input-consumption mismatch, while the hosted workflow-equivalent packaged build flow passed. Hosted checks, implementation review, merge-ready, merge, and closeout remain pending.
